title: The Shanghai Drama
writer: Alexandre Arnoux, Oscar Paul Gilbert, Henri Jeanson
actors: Christl Mardayn, Louis Jouvet, Raymond Rouleau
plot: A Russian emigrant sings in a Shanghai nightclub under the assumed name of Kay Murphy. All she dreams of is a peaceful life with her daughter Vera. But this is only a pipe dream as she has been forced by her former lover Ivan to w...
